sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ أَحْمَدُ إِلَى مُقَابَلَةِ عَمَلٍ جَدِيدَةٍ صَبَاحَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je jutros otišao na razgovor za novi posao.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed went to a new job interview this morning.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَرْتَدِي مَلَابِسَ رَسْمِيَّةً وَيَبْدُو وَاثِقًا مِنْ نَفْسِهِ.
sentences.translation: Nosio je formalnu odjeću i izgledao je samouvjereno.
sentences.translationEn: He was wearing formal clothes and looked confident in himself.

sentences.arabic: أَجَابَ عَنِ الْأَسْئِلَةِ بِهُدُوءٍ وَاحْتِرَافِيَّةٍ عَالِيَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Odgovarao je na pitanja smireno i s visokom profesionalnošću.
sentences.translationEn: He answered the questions calmly and with high professionalism.

sentences.arabic: يَتَمَنَّى أَحْمَدُ أَنْ يَحْصُلَ عَلَى هَذِهِ الْوَظِيفَةِ الْمُمَيَّزَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed se nada da će dobiti ovaj poseban posao.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed hopes to get this distinguished job.
